steps.title: Use the graph value
steps.content: The graph shown is $y=f(x)+4$. From the graph, when $x=0$, the displayed value is $8$.

steps.title: Find the function value
steps.content:
Subtract the vertical shift:
$$
f(0)+4=8
$$
So $f(0)=4$.

steps.title: Choose the constant term
steps.content: Each choice has the form $f(x)=-6^x+c$. Since $6^0=1$, use $f(0)=4$: $$ -1+c=4 $$ So $c=5$. The answer is B.
